# MEDIA-OUTREACH — Media / Public Reach

## When

Use when a policy/content artifact is ready to circulate.

## Purpose

Create contact with journalists, public channels, or media-adjacent actors.

## Inputs

- Content artifact
- Angle / one-liner
- Contact list
- Publication or pitch target
- Evidence log

## Steps minimum

1. Choose one piece.
2. Choose one audience/contact.
3. Write a short pitch.
4. Send or publish.
5. Log response/next pointer.

## Output

Media/public outreach action.

## Tick valid when

A pitch, post, message, or publication is out.

## Stop rule

Do not build a full media strategy inside one outreach action.
